subject: Plugin drain: FP/CSR/V via find_reg loop
description: Extend hybrid_handoff.c to read f0..f31, mstatus..satp, pmpcfg/pmpaddr, vstart/vtype/vl/vlenb/v0..v31 via find_reg() and qemu_plugin_read_register(). Set HYBRID_FLAG_FP and HYBRID_FLAG_V appropriately. Test via state_abi static_asserts already present.
activeForm: Extending QEMU plugin to drain FP/CSR/V
